ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market capitalization of the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (CIK) */,
  "hq_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Listing date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_market_cap_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_cap_id") REFERENCES market_cap ("market_cap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the statement covers */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter the statement covers */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was filed */,
  "reporting_currency" TEXT /* Currency used for reporting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the data belongs to */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the period */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit for the period */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income for the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "total_shares_outstanding" INTEGER /* Total shares outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the data belongs to */,
  "cash_and_equivalents" REAL /* Cash and equivalents */,
  "current_assets" REAL /* Current assets */,
  "long_term_assets" REAL /* Long-term assets */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets */,
  "current_liabilities" REAL /* Current liabilities */,
  "long_term_liabilities" REAL /* Long-term liabilities */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities */,
  "shareholders_equity" REAL /* Shareholders' equity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the data belongs to */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow for the period */,
  "capital_expenditure" REAL /* Capital expenditure for the period */,
  "investing_cash_flow" REAL /* Investing cash flow for the period */,
  "financing_cash_flow" REAL /* Financing cash flow for the period */,
  "net_change_in_cash" REAL /* Net change in cash for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization range */,
  "market_cap_range" TEXT /* Market capitalization range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market capitalization range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the market capitalization range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the market capitalization range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the financial metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Analyst rating (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation (e.g., overweight, underweight, equal weight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_dates" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the announcement belongs to */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date of the announcement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the announcement */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of announcement (e.g., earnings release, conference call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_dates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the estimate belongs to */,
  "estimate_date" TEXT /* Date of the estimate */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Financial metric being estimated (e.g., revenue, earnings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Estimated value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date of the transcript */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_teams" (
  "management_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management team member */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the management team member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the management team member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the management team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_management_teams_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the holding belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institutional holder */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the institution */,
  "percentage_owned" REAL /* Percentage of outstanding shares owned by the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
